reason: Rationale A is more specific and helpful to the shopper, describing the necklace as 'clean, modern' and 'delicate,' which aligns with the minimalist daily wear request. It also identifies a target wearer (style-conscious professional), giving the shopper useful context. While neither option includes a pearl as requested, A at least acknowledges the everyday wear angle more thoroughly without overclaiming. B is too brief and generic, offering little beyond a vague day-to-evening transition note.
